title: System Info (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk menampilkan informasi sistem, hardware, dan konfigurasi Windows.

commands.name: systeminfo
commands.title: systeminfo — Info Sistem Lengkap
commands.description: Menampilkan informasi lengkap tentang sistem operasi, hardware, dan konfigurasi.
commands.examples:
# Info sistem lengkap
systeminfo

# Info singkat (filter)
systeminfo | findstr /i "OS Name OS Version"
systeminfo | findstr /i "Total Physical Memory"

# Ekspor ke CSV
systeminfo /fo csv > sysinfo.csv

# PowerShell
Get-ComputerInfo
Get-ComputerInfo | Select-Object OsName, OsVersion, CsTotalPhysicalMemory

commands.name: hostname-win
commands.title: hostname — Nama Komputer
commands.examples:
# Tampilkan hostname
hostname

# PowerShell
$env:COMPUTERNAME
[System.Net.Dns]::GetHostName()

# Ganti hostname (PowerShell admin)
Rename-Computer -NewName "NewPC" -Restart

commands.name: ver
commands.title: ver / winver — Versi Windows
commands.examples:
# Versi di CMD
ver

# Dialog versi Windows
winver

# PowerShell: Detail
[System.Environment]::OSVersion
(Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).Caption
(Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).Version

commands.name: wmic-info
commands.title: wmic — WMI Query Info Sistem
commands.description: Menggunakan WMI untuk mengambil berbagai informasi hardware dan software.
commands.examples:
# Info OS
wmic os get caption,version,osarchitecture

# Info CPU
wmic cpu get name,numberofcores,maxclockspeed

# Info RAM
wmic memorychip get capacity,speed,manufacturer

# Info GPU
wmic path win32_VideoController get name,driverversion

# Serial number
wmic bios get serialnumber

# Software terinstal
wmic product get name,version

# PowerShell: Get-CimInstance
Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select Name, NumberOfCores
Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | Select Capacity, Speed
Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select Name

commands.name: set-env
commands.title: set / setx — Environment Variables
commands.description: Menampilkan dan mengatur environment variable di Windows.
commands.examples:
# Tampilkan semua
set

# Tampilkan PATH
set PATH
echo %PATH%

# Set temporary
set MYVAR=hello

# Set permanen (user)
setx JAVA_HOME "C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17"

# Set permanen (system)
setx /m PATH "%PATH%;C:\tools"

# PowerShell
$env:PATH
$env:MYVAR = "hello"
[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("MYVAR", "hello", "User")
[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("MYVAR", "hello", "Machine")
commands.warning: setx memiliki batas 1024 karakter. Hati-hati saat mengubah PATH yang panjang — bisa terpotong!

commands.name: msinfo32
commands.title: msinfo32 — System Information GUI
commands.description: Menampilkan informasi sistem lengkap dalam antarmuka grafis.
commands.examples:
# Buka System Information
msinfo32

# Ekspor ke file teks
msinfo32 /report C:\sysinfo.txt

# Simpan sebagai NFO
msinfo32 /nfo C:\sysinfo.nfo
